MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Thu, 29 Feb 2024 07:33:55 -0800
Subject: 104 killed in strike on Gaza food line; Israel says trucks were attacked: Live updates
Message-ID: <65e0a3e6.170a0220.fc1fd.d37fSMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<tr class="container">
    <td class="OneColLarge">
        <table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0px 5px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);" width="600">
            <tr>
                <td>
                    <a id="LrgCardImage1" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAC4PVATAZ4SC753NQK3RXN2OFYFHJI5SZHSH7OUBRYQMPAE7ZWV3O44BSVB3D4SP2EWSGH46HOYH7EAFIA6IODCLHGRY3T2LSPJJTBEPIEC4WCPITINPTEW2GZSXJL26AT3WZZQD4L2UIY3X43A3R3K7JMXTEW6344USS223HUJQMPKO46R5M&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">

            <tr>
                <td width="560" align="left" style="padding: 20px 20px 8px 20px; font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size:28px; line-height:1.2;color:#333333;font-weight:normal;text-decoration:none;">
                    <a id="LrgCardTitle1" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADZPY522EBUOWU4DPNCEKGMKECRKRGDC4SK4H24TV7EMOFOME7WS6BCY2CAFMEU4VM67OMO7MVO5OTHD4IY3ZIDOY5WNDP3T7XZAU3KGTRVKOH4VRGHZC33LJMET7XIODZRKXOMPGCXNDLU6MSRQ235H2G5OY5JZQVSQLJXX44J44LQBK3EXW&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">

            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td align="left" style="padding: 0px 20px 11px 20px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 18px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.3;">

                            The Israeli military said humanitarian aid trucks were attacked, provided no casualty count and said the clash was under…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td height="25" align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 0px 20px 15px 37px;">

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">

                    <tr>
                        <td height="12"></td>
                    </tr>

                    <tr>
                        <td align="center" width="100%">
                            <table style="padding: 0; margin: 0;  max-width: 600px; max-height: 300px; vertical-align:middle;" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
                                <tr>
                                    
<td class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);">
                <td>
                    <a id="SmlArticleImg4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAC44ZZIBXJK47EMWU73OG2T3KFTRFTZHEZLXEVCRG5MMWRL4X5ARP3FJFDDHXTFXLPVPVEO3WJ3DENUGEM35R2OAEJ3IEGFBEATXEDZYKD75QHLA4YLQZKOBWNTNBTXOIPN5G24R3MQOE5HPGBQCE65ERC37QRA7R3LHIQC6EJPU5P7FB74CS&" target="_blank">
                        <img width="295" height="160" style="border: none; display: block; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0px;" src="https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.709198a81878aa005961d040e696c236&pid=Wdp&w=295&h=160&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2">
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="SmlArticleTitle4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACQIHPAVGOVBN2HRX6ICYTXVFILKPLSSMWLMIVAERX3YOF3KFHD3MTRMR54BGSX2KEREUEG62GQ5VUQTWKAKEXST55K3OQ6QERCSALYGWGVOLYKTCZJQJX7T7CSFMVOCS7K23KQVZ6W3I5RKVZAOYUHVZHIE7AXN5RKHWH4F7Q4KZ2Q4KCQH3&" target="_blank">
                        Americans Get Two Social Security Payments This Week
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                    <td height="45" style="padding-right: 12px; padding-top: 5px">
                                        <a id="SmlArticlePubLogo4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADJHYZRGOV7FWWQHNS47BHVNSV4QPJ3EEC54QP4HQE4TZCLINGPGRMKICWS3V5ZJHKORW744RBAK5TR7BF6MHEICIJLCV7PZZFJ7AQ5AEE3YH3VZXZ5VWONRSLEDXBAKPIG22R7M5N5RFVLZV5O656SCCTEP3GOK773GTBPYS3UKBBDGRRXC7&" target="_blank">
                                            <img height="22" style="border: none;" alt="" src="https://img-s-msn-com.akamaized.net/tenant/amp/entityid/AA12I8qo.img?w=22&h=22&m=6&q=60&u=t&o=t&l=f&f=jpg">
                                        </a>
                                    </td>
                                <td height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">
                                    <a id="SmlArticlePubName4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADP7ZYOTSPZBUOE4Q6KQPZ2I5ROHMYHZB3IFSLGL3CTRNWTHN4D7JLF7GZ7FK2GOYHI5W5ZDSSJCENHM2S4ISZQZL7BU3T4VFREMA3JDBUIBBTA3MBEI7D47QDFFGR3KMA2LUI3BRNE7XT26Y6ZFV3QFDC35KOKUFZKUGTLASFNMRRMPBE3XM&" target="_blank">
                                        Newsweek
                                    </a>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </td>
            </tr>
        </tbody>
    </table>
</td>
                                    <td style="padding:4px;margin:0px;width:0px; background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;
                                    </td>
                                    
<td class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);">
                <td>
                    <a id="SmlArticleImg5" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACNSVRZRSTUJNUXX6A24NB4PSFOZ5DNTECDN363ZVSWWGXB4PE34QX5KLHBZB5N4I2NNWVRDUKU2LJ5Y5VETLHDOX2PWGGOKVLV5X5DRDLTNNJ6NJ72QNYACW3DWTOTLQQRUXPYGBIVKMYNXVDKGTJUUQNBHNMYJEWL55J6HG5GL3I435OBJM&" target="_blank">

                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="SmlArticleTitle5" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADZGOWH6WDHLE2V27BKVPKWHVCGVLJ7IQKUJLJVSHYYWQ2G6YRB75JGVBEN6CUBDDXIVPG2OONCASED356TCZVOJHSKR2XSQIV4HDORMCSYJXQ6ZY3BXH6P5HPTQQHS5ZKHXNBN2XTVZNLDARSWFCTPTKOUJAK4IPB2YFK2YJYSGOF6XLPFTK&" target="_blank">
                        Thousands of NY voters switch to Dem Party ahead of 'Squad' member's…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>

                                            <img height="22" style="border: none;" alt="" src="https://img-s-msn-com.akamaized.net/tenant/amp/entityid/AAywOab.img?w=22&h=22&m=6&q=60&u=t&o=t&l=f&f=jpg">
                                        </a>
                                    </td>
                                <td height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">
                                    <a id="SmlArticlePubName5" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAC2HAAEKYTHZ3ILAUWKRJAEWPPCQRP72UNNDYOW2ZGOA2FB2Z3JRVNERLSKSD26GNB4W2FYAFGHMTZABHOGFFLDPWR26JNING7IPG6423RYWDQ452NXU2PIHAQ4W45HVISMQSNJL5ABZFCI3LE4S3TNM3VLVOAW5YJWAZARFDZXUXCA7VTCPJ&" target="_blank">
                                        FOX News

</td>

                    </tr>

                        <td height="12"></td>
                    </tr>

                    <tr>
    <td>
        <div align="center">
            <br>
        </div>
        <div align="center">
            <table align="center" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" width="550">
                <tr>

    </td>
</tr>
<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">
